description_long: This clock tower features a rectangular wooden structure with a dark, polished finish and classical architectural elements, including two fluted columns on the front. The upper section houses a large, round clock face with a gold trim, black Arabic numerals, and black hour and minute hands. Below the clock face, there is a glass panel with decorative metalwork, revealing a pendulum inside. The roof is gently arched with a carved decorative motif at the center, adding a touch of elegance. The sides and back are plain, emphasizing the ornate front. The overall design suggests a blend of Neoclassical and traditional styles, making it a striking focal point in an urban setting.
description: A dark wooden clock tower with a gold-trimmed round clock face, fluted columns, and an arched roof with decorative carvings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate clock face, fluted columns, glass panel with pendulum, and decorative arched roof.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wooden panel and the profile of the fluted column and arched roof.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, unadorned wooden surface and the full width of the arched roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with a plain wooden panel and the profile of the column and roof.
attribute_clock_face_design: The clock face is large, round, and bordered with a gold trim. It features black Arabic numerals from 1 to 12, black hour and minute hands, and a white background. The design is simple and functional, with no additional decorative elements on the face itself.
